name: chain_ph_launch_infros_predict_and_validate
method: [PH LAUNCH] InfrOS: Predict and validate cloud architectures before launch

stages.task: Scrape PH daily filtering for categories: developer-tools, infrastructure, cloud, devops, kubernetes, serverless. Extract maker profiles, upvoter list, company URLs. Use playwright MCP.
Filter for founders/CTOs/DevOps leads at companies with signals of cloud spend (AWS/GCP/Azure in stack, funded, >5 employees). Score 0-10. Drop students and solo hobbyists.
Generate personalized cold outreach referencing their specific PH launch + cloud architecture pain point. Route to cold_email_scripts.py within 48h of launch while momentum is live.
